notes: Architect is model-neutral and plans work without claiming tasks.
Each task can be claimed by only one model: claude or codex.
Claiming a task creates an isolated branch and worktree.
The other model must not pick a claimed task.

tasks.title: Fix bid submission permission-denied error

tasks.title: End-to-end regression QA after UX-201 to UX-212 changes
tasks.description: Run all integration tests on iOS simulator with Firebase emulators. Fix any regressions found from the 12 UX stabilization tasks. Ensure both marketplace flows (bidding + direct hire) still work end-to-end.

Cleaned up worktree/branch after merge

tasks.title: Fix Firestore rules blocking direct hire task creation
tasks.description: Security rules require status==open on task create, but direct hire creates with status=assigned. Fix rules to allow both. Also fix rules to allow assigned provider status updates beyond just status+updatedAt.
notes: Claimed by claude from base main at 2026-04-05T03:22:33+00:00

tasks.title: Fix GoRouter force-unwraps on route parameters
tasks.description: app_router.dart uses ! on pathParameters for taskId, chatId, userId, listingId. If deep link or back navigation delivers null, app crashes. Add null checks with fallback navigation.
notes: Claimed by claude from base main at 2026-04-05T03:23:32+00:00
